messages.content: 那请你帮我生成一个这样子的 latex 脚本

<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="18">
<summary>Thought for 18 seconds</summary>
> 用户想要我生成一个LaTeX脚本来重现图片中显示的内容。让我分析一下图片中的内容：
> 
> 1. 有一个带圆角的蓝紫色背景框
> 2. 标题 "Round 4"
> 3. 里面有一个白色/浅色的内框
> 4. 包含 "Lemma 13:" 及其陈述
> 5. "Proof 13:" 及其证明的开始部分（Step 1）
> 
> 我需要创建一个LaTeX文档，使用tcolorbox或类似的包来实现这种嵌套的彩色框效果。
> 
> 让我来构建这个LaTeX代码：
> 
> ```latex
> \documentclass{article}
> \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
> \usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
> \usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}
> \usepackage{enumitem}
> 
> \begin{document}
> 
> \begin{tcolorbox}[
>     colback=blue!20,
>     colframe=blue!40,
>     rounded corners,
>     width=\textwidth,
>     title={Round 4},
>     fonttitle=\Large\bfseries,
>     coltitle=black,
>     toptitle=1mm,
>     bottomtitle=1mm
> ]
> 
> \begin{tcolorbox}[
>     colback=white,
>     colframe=gray!30,
>     rounded corners,
>     width=\textwidth,
>     boxrule=0.5pt
> ]
> 
> \textbf{Lemma 13:}
> 
> In any set of 6 points consisting only of points on the three sides (i.e., containing no internal points), the arrangement wherein at most two points are on any single side cannot avoid an isosceles triangle. In other words, if a point set $S \subseteq \{(i,j) \mid i > 0, j > 0, i + j \leq 4\}$ contains 6 points and no internal points, then there must exist three points $P, Q, R \in S$ such that $|RP| = |RQ|$, thereby forming an isosceles triangle.
> 
> 
> \end{tcolorbox}
> 
> I'll continue the proof by analyzing the point distribution across the triangle's sides. If three points are concentrated on a single side, I can easily construct an isosceles triangle. The challenge lies in understanding how the remaining points are distributed to ensure the isosceles triangle's formation.
</details>
```latex
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}
\usepackage{enumitem}

\begin{document}

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=blue!25!white,
    colframe=blue!50!white,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    title={Round 4},
    fonttitle=\Large\bfseries,
    coltitle=black,
    toptitle=2mm,
    bottomtitle=2mm,
    left=3mm,
    right=3mm,
    top=3mm,
    bottom=3mm
]

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=white,
    colframe=gray!20,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    boxrule=0.5pt,
    left=5mm,
    right=5mm,
    top=4mm,
    bottom=4mm
]

\textbf{Lemma 13:}

In any set of 6 points consisting only of points on the three sides (i.e., containing no internal points), the arrangement wherein at most two points are on any single side cannot avoid an isosceles triangle. In other words, if a point set 
$S \subseteq \{(i,j) \mid i > 0, j > 0, i + j \leq 4\}$ contains 6 points and no internal points, then there must exist three points $P, Q, R \in S$ such that $|RP| = |RQ|$, thereby forming an isosceles triangle.

\medskip

\textbf{Proof 13:}

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=5mm]
    \item \textbf{Step 1:} Let $x, y, z$ be the number of points in $S$ on sides $AB$, $AC$, $BC$, respectively, such that $x + y + z = 6$. If the number of points on any side is $\geq 3$, select any two points $P, Q$ on that side. By Lemma 4 (two points on the same side must have a third equidistant point), there exists a point $R \neq P, Q$ (located on another
\end{itemize}

\end{tcolorbox}

\end{tcolorbox}

\end{document}
```

这个LaTeX脚本会生成一个类似您图片的效果，包括：
- 外层蓝紫色圆角框（标题"Round 4"）
- 内层白色圆角框（包含引理和证明内容）
- 数学公式和符号
- 带项目符号的列表

您可以根据需要调整颜色深度、边距和圆角大小等参数。
如何修改 title 的字号

<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="3">
<summary>Thought for 3 seconds</summary>
> 用户想要修改标题的字号。在tcolorbox中，可以通过`fonttitle`参数来修改标题的字体样式和大小。
> 
> 常见的LaTeX字号命令包括：
> - \tiny
> - \scriptsize
> - \footnotesize
> - \small
> - \normalsize
> - \large
> - \Large
> - \LARGE
> - \huge
> - \Huge
> 
> 当前代码中使用的是`fonttitle=\Large\bfseries`，用户可以修改`\Large`为其他字号命令。
> 
> 我应该给出几种方式：
> 1. 使用LaTeX预定义的字号命令
> 2. 使用具体的字号大小（如果需要更精确的控制）
</details>
修改 title 字号有以下几种方法：

## 方法1：使用 LaTeX 预定义字号命令

修改 `fonttitle` 参数中的字号命令：

```latex
\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=blue!25!white,
    colframe=blue!50!white,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    title={Round 4},
    fonttitle=\Huge\bfseries,        % 改为 \Huge (最大)
    % 或者其他选项：
    % fonttitle=\huge\bfseries,      % 很大
    % fonttitle=\LARGE\bfseries,     % 大
    % fonttitle=\Large\bfseries,     % 较大（原来的）
    % fonttitle=\large\bfseries,     % 稍大
    % fonttitle=\normalsize\bfseries, % 正常
    coltitle=black,
    ...
]
```

## 方法2：使用具体的字号大小

```latex
fonttitle=\fontsize{20}{24}\selectfont\bfseries,  % 20pt字号，24pt行距
```

## 字号大小对比（从小到大）

- `\tiny` - 最小
- `\scriptsize`
- `\footnotesize`
- `\small`
- `\normalsize` - 正常大小
- `\large`
- `\Large` - 当前使用
- `\LARGE`
- `\huge`
- `\Huge` - 最大

选择您需要的字号替换即可！

colback=blue!25!white,
    colframe=blue!50!white,
  
这两行是什么意思

<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="2">
<summary>Thought for 2 seconds</summary>
> 用户问的是 tcolorbox 中的颜色设置参数的含义。让我详细解释一下这两个参数。
> 
> - `colback=blue!25!white` - 这是背景色
> - `colframe=blue!50!white` - 这是边框色
> 
> 这里用到了 LaTeX/xcolor 包的颜色混合语法：`color1!percentage!color2`
> 
> 让我详细解释这个语法。
</details>
这两行是设置 tcolorbox 的**颜色**参数：

## 参数含义

```latex
colback=blue!25!white,   % 设置盒子的背景色（background color）
colframe=blue!50!white,  % 设置盒子的边框色（frame color）
```

## 颜色混合语法

`blue!25!white` 这种写法是 LaTeX 的颜色混合语法：

```
颜色1!百分比!颜色2
```

意思是：**25% 的蓝色 + 75% 的白色**

### 具体解释：

- `blue!25!white` = 25% 蓝色 + 75% 白色 = **浅蓝色**（用于背景）
- `blue!50!white` = 50% 蓝色 + 50% 白色 = **中等蓝色**（用于边框）

## 常见用法示例

```latex
red!100!white   % 纯红色（100%红色）
red!50!white    % 粉红色（50%红色+50%白色）
red!20!white    % 很浅的粉红色

blue!100!white  % 纯蓝色
blue!75!white   % 较深蓝色
blue!25!white   % 浅蓝色
blue!10!white   % 很浅的蓝色

green!60!black  % 60%绿色+40%黑色 = 深绿色
```

## 如果想调整颜色

```latex
colback=blue!15!white,   % 更浅的背景（更接近白色）
colframe=blue!70!white,  % 更深的边框（更接近蓝色）
```

或者直接使用颜色名称：
```latex
colback=cyan!20,         % 浅青色
colframe=blue,           % 纯蓝色
```
可以用二进制颜色数值吗

<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="2">
<summary>Thought for 2 seconds</summary>
> 用户问是否可以用二进制颜色数值。我想他们可能是指十六进制（hex）颜色值，比如 #FF0000，而不是真正的二进制。在网页开发中，我们常用十六进制颜色代码，比如 #RGB 或 #RRGGBB。
> 
> 在 LaTeX 中，可以使用多种方式定义颜色：
> 1. RGB 值（0-255 或 0-1）
> 2. HTML 十六进制颜色代码
> 3. CMYK 值
> 4. 预定义颜色名称
> 
> 让我提供一个完整的答案。
</details>
可以！在 LaTeX 中可以使用多种颜色数值格式，包括十六进制（类似 HTML 颜色代码）和 RGB 值。

## 方法1：使用十六进制颜色（HTML格式）

需要添加 `xcolor` 包：

```latex
\usepackage[dvipsnames,table,xcdraw]{xcolor}

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback={HTML}{E6E6FA},    % 十六进制浅紫色 #E6E6FA
    colframe={HTML}{9370DB},   % 十六进制中紫色 #9370DB
    ...
]
```

## 方法2：使用 RGB 值（0-255）

```latex
\usepackage{xcolor}

\definecolor{myback}{RGB}{230,230,250}   % 定义背景色
\definecolor{myframe}{RGB}{147,112,219}  % 定义边框色

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=myback,
    colframe=myframe,
    ...
]
```

## 方法3：使用 RGB 值（0-1 小数）

```latex
\definecolor{myback}{rgb}{0.90,0.90,0.98}   % RGB 小数形式
\definecolor{myframe}{rgb}{0.58,0.44,0.86}

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=myback,
    colframe=myframe,
    ...
]
```

## 方法4：直接在参数中定义

```latex
\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback={RGB}{230,230,250},
    colframe={RGB}{147,112,219},
    ...
]
```

## 完整示例

```latex
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{xcolor}  % 颜色包

% 定义自定义颜色
\definecolor{lightpurple}{HTML}{D4C5E8}  % 浅紫色背景
\definecolor{mediumpurple}{HTML}{B4A0D6} % 中紫色边框

\begin{document}

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=lightpurple,
    colframe=mediumpurple,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    title={Round 4},
    fonttitle=\Large\bfseries,
    coltitle=black,
    ...
]
% 内容
\end{tcolorbox}

\end{document}
```

## 常见颜色对照表

| 颜色描述 | HTML | RGB (0-255) |
|---------|------|-------------|
| 浅紫色 | #E6E6FA | 230,230,250 |
| 淡蓝紫 | #D4C5E8 | 212,197,232 |
| 天蓝色 | #87CEEB | 135,206,235 |
| 浅粉色 | #FFB6C1 | 255,182,193 |

这样就可以精确控制颜色了！

<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="4">
<summary>Thought for 4 seconds</summary>
> 用户遇到了错误：`Package xcolor Error: Undefined color '{HTML}{c2eaf7}'`
> 
> 问题在于使用 `{HTML}` 格式时的语法错误。正确的语法应该是：
> - `colback={HTML}{c2eaf7}` 中 HTML 和颜色值之间不应该有花括号分隔
> - 或者需要先定义颜色再使用
> 
> 正确的写法应该是：
> 1. 直接使用：`colback=HTML{c2eaf7}` （不需要第一对花括号）
> 2. 或者先定义：`\definecolor{mycolor}{HTML}{c2eaf7}` 然后 `colback=mycolor`
> 
> 让我给出正确的语法。
</details>
我看到问题了！使用 HTML 颜色格式的语法不对。有两种正确的写法：

## 方法1：先定义颜色，再使用（推荐）

```latex
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage{xcolor}  % 必须在 tcolorbox 之前加载
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}
\usepackage{enumitem}

% 定义颜色
\definecolor{mybackcolor}{HTML}{c2eaf7}
\definecolor{myframecolor}{HTML}{8dd4f0}

\begin{document}

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=mybackcolor,      % 使用定义好的颜色
    colframe=myframecolor,    % 使用定义好的颜色
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    title={Round 4},
    fonttitle=\normalsize\bfseries,
    coltitle=black,
    toptitle=2mm,
    bottomtitle=2mm,
    left=3mm,
    right=3mm,
    top=3mm,
    bottom=3mm
]
% 内容
\end{tcolorbox}

\end{document}
```

## 方法2：直接使用（注意语法）

```latex
\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback={[HTML]{c2eaf7}},     % 注意是方括号 []
    colframe={[HTML]{8dd4f0}},    % 注意是方括号 []
    ...
]
```

## 关键点：

1. **包的加载顺序**：`xcolor` 必须在 `tcolorbox` 之前加载
2. **语法错误**：`{HTML}{c2eaf7}` ❌ 应该改为 `{[HTML]{c2eaf7}}` ✅ 或先定义颜色
3. **推荐做法**：使用 `\definecolor` 先定义，代码更清晰

建议使用**方法1**，这样代码更易读易维护！

请你把下面这段 prompt 作为内容展现出来：
  
```python
"""
## Task Description
You are a professional researcher collaborating with your Writing Assistant to complete a document. The Writing Assistant will fill in subsequent content based on the user's typed input <USER_INPUT>. Your responsibility is: given the user's typed input <USER_INPUT>, the Assistant-generated completion <COMPLETION>, and the reference text (original content at the completion position) <REFERENCE>, determine whether this completion should be "accepted" or "rejected".
## Decision Criteria (Checklist)
Please execute strictly in order, first checking blocking conditions. When triggered, make a direct judgment without proceeding to subsequent comparisons.
1. Start repetition: if <COMPLETION> starts with a **repetition** of <USER_INPUT> → reject.
2. Language mismatch: if <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> are in different languages (e.g., English vs. Simplified Chinese vs. Traditional Chinese) → reject.
3. Semantic coherence: if <USER_INPUT> + <COMPLETION> form a contradictory or incoherent sequence → reject.
4. Early semantic overlap with <REFERENCE>: if the overlapping content between the beginning of <COMPLETION> and the beginning of <REFERENCE> accounts for more than 50% of the total <COMPLETION> content → accept.
5. Paired punctuation mark closure: unclosed quotes/brackets introduced in <USER_INPUT> remain unclosed in <COMPLETION> → reject.
6. Markdown/LaTeX/Code closure: any opened Markdown/LaTeX/code fences from <USER_INPUT> not properly closed in <COMPLETION> → reject.
7. Format mismatch: if format mismatch between <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> (headings, tables, lists, text) → reject.
8. Format consistency with preceding text: the format/style used in <COMPLETION> diverges from the format established by the preceding content of <USER_INPUT> and <REFERENCE>, e.g., changes in list type, indentation levels, heading levels → reject.
9. Depth mismatch: specificity/level of detail diverges from <REFERENCE> beyond tolerance (±30%) → reject.
10. Style/Register mismatch: academic vs conversational vs authoritative diverges from <REFERENCE> → reject.
11. Sentence type mismatch: declarative vs interrogative vs imperative diverges from <REFERENCE> → reject.
12. Personal perspective check: If <COMPLETION> shifts the narrative perspective (first person, second person, third person) established in <USER_INPUT> → reject.
13. Subset acceptance (lists/tables): if <COMPLETION> is a true subset of <REFERENCE> (same order, no new items; tables must keep columns and header order) → accept.
14. Topic divergence: if <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> address different topics → reject.
15. Key entities: missing or altered key entities (names, trial IDs, datasets, metrics, units, dates，statistics data, terminology) compared to <REFERENCE> → reject.
16. Intent mismatch: if the intent of <COMPLETION> differs from <REFERENCE> (e.g., summary vs. argument vs. instruction) → reject.
17. Comprehensive judgment: if none of the above conditions are triggered, please carefully analyze the <USER_INPUT> and <REFERENCE>, then make a comprehensive judgment on whether to accept the <COMPLETION> based on style, semantics, entities, and other factors.
## Output Format
Please strictly use the following JSON format for output and enclose the entire JSON in \boxed{{ ... }},
\\boxed{{
    "accept": true | false,
    "triggered_condition": the rule number and name (e.g., "1. Start repetition"),
    "reasoning": "Provide your reasoning, explicitly mentioning which rule number was triggered and why."
}}
## Task Input
<USER_INPUT>:"{context}"
<REFERENCE>: "{sentence_A}"
<COMPLETION>: "{sentence_B}"
"""
```

<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="8">
<summary>Thought for 8 seconds</summary>
> 用户希望我把这段 Python 代码中的 prompt 文本作为 LaTeX 文档的内容展现出来。这段内容包含了很多特殊字符，比如：
> - 引号
> - 花括号（在 LaTeX 中有特殊含义）
> - 下划线（在 LaTeX 中是数学模式的下标符号）
> - 百分号（在 LaTeX 中是注释符号）
> - 反斜杠（LaTeX 命令符号）
> - 尖括号
> - 代码块
> 
> 我需要：
> 1. 正确转义所有特殊字符
> 2. 保持原有的格式结构
> 3. 使用合适的环境展示代码/文本内容
> 
> 我可以使用 `verbatim` 环境或者 `listings` 包来展示代码，或者使用 `tcolorbox` 配合合适的设置。
> 
> 考虑到用户之前的上下文是关于 tcolorbox 的样式，我应该创建一个完整的 LaTeX 文档，把这段 prompt 放在一个好看的盒子里。
> 
> 由于内容很长且包含特殊字符，最好使用 `lstlisting` 环境或 `verbatim` 环境。
</details>
```latex
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{listings}
\usepackage[margin=2cm]{geometry}

% 定义颜色
\definecolor{mybackcolor}{HTML}{c2eaf7}
\definecolor{myframecolor}{HTML}{8dd4f0}

% 配置代码显示样式
\lstset{
    basicstyle=\small\ttfamily,
    breaklines=true,
    breakatwhitespace=false,
    columns=flexible,
    keepspaces=true,
    showstringspaces=false,
    frame=none,
}

\begin{document}

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=mybackcolor,
    colframe=myframecolor,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    title={Round 4},
    fonttitle=\Large\bfseries,
    coltitle=black,
    toptitle=2mm,
    bottomtitle=2mm,
    left=3mm,
    right=3mm,
    top=3mm,
    bottom=3mm
]

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=white,
    colframe=gray!20,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    boxrule=0.5pt,
    left=5mm,
    right=5mm,
    top=4mm,
    bottom=4mm
]

\begin{lstlisting}[language=Python]
"""
## Task Description
You are a professional researcher collaborating with your Writing Assistant to complete a document. The Writing Assistant will fill in subsequent content based on the user's typed input <USER_INPUT>. Your responsibility is: given the user's typed input <USER_INPUT>, the Assistant-generated completion <COMPLETION>, and the reference text (original content at the completion position) <REFERENCE>, determine whether this completion should be "accepted" or "rejected".

## Decision Criteria (Checklist)
Please execute strictly in order, first checking blocking conditions. When triggered, make a direct judgment without proceeding to subsequent comparisons.

1. Start repetition: if <COMPLETION> starts with a **repetition** of <USER_INPUT> -> reject.
2. Language mismatch: if <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> are in different languages (e.g., English vs. Simplified Chinese vs. Traditional Chinese) -> reject.
3. Semantic coherence: if <USER_INPUT> + <COMPLETION> form a contradictory or incoherent sequence -> reject.
4. Early semantic overlap with <REFERENCE>: if the overlapping content between the beginning of <COMPLETION> and the beginning of <REFERENCE> accounts for more than 50% of the total <COMPLETION> content -> accept.
5. Paired punctuation mark closure: unclosed quotes/brackets introduced in <USER_INPUT> remain unclosed in <COMPLETION> -> reject.
6. Markdown/LaTeX/Code closure: any opened Markdown/LaTeX/code fences from <USER_INPUT> not properly closed in <COMPLETION> -> reject.
7. Format mismatch: if format mismatch between <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> (headings, tables, lists, text) -> reject.
8. Format consistency with preceding text: the format/style used in <COMPLETION> diverges from the format established by the preceding content of <USER_INPUT> and <REFERENCE>, e.g., changes in list type, indentation levels, heading levels -> reject.
9. Depth mismatch: specificity/level of detail diverges from <REFERENCE> beyond tolerance (+-30%) -> reject.
10. Style/Register mismatch: academic vs conversational vs authoritative diverges from <REFERENCE> -> reject.
11. Sentence type mismatch: declarative vs interrogative vs imperative diverges from <REFERENCE> -> reject.
12. Personal perspective check: If <COMPLETION> shifts the narrative perspective (first person, second person, third person) established in <USER_INPUT> -> reject.
13. Subset acceptance (lists/tables): if <COMPLETION> is a true subset of <REFERENCE> (same order, no new items; tables must keep columns and header order) -> accept.
14. Topic divergence: if <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> address different topics -> reject.
15. Key entities: missing or altered key entities (names, trial IDs, datasets, metrics, units, dates, statistics data, terminology) compared to <REFERENCE> -> reject.
16. Intent mismatch: if the intent of <COMPLETION> differs from <REFERENCE> (e.g., summary vs. argument vs. instruction) -> reject.
17. Comprehensive judgment: if none of the above conditions are triggered, please carefully analyze the <USER_INPUT> and <REFERENCE>, then make a comprehensive judgment on whether to accept the <COMPLETION> based on style, semantics, entities, and other factors.

## Output Format
Please strictly use the following JSON format for output and enclose the entire JSON in \boxed{{ ... }},
\boxed{{
    "accept": true | false,
    "triggered_condition": the rule number and name (e.g., "1. Start repetition"),
    "reasoning": "Provide your reasoning, explicitly mentioning which rule number was triggered and why."
}}

## Task Input
<USER_INPUT>:"{context}"
<REFERENCE>: "{sentence_A}"
<COMPLETION>: "{sentence_B}"
"""
\end{lstlisting}

\end{tcolorbox}

\end{tcolorbox}

\end{document}
```

这个 LaTeX 脚本会：
- 使用您之前设置的颜色方案
- 将 prompt 内容放在代码环境中展示
- 保持所有特殊字符和格式
- 自动处理换行

如果您想要更简洁的样式（不要代码高亮），也可以使用 `verbatim` 环境替换 `lstlisting` 部分。
一页展示不下，如果让这个表格自动换到下一页

<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="3">
<summary>Thought for 3 seconds</summary>
> 用户想让内容自动换页。有几个方法：
> 
> 1. 使用 `tcolorbox` 的 `breakable` 选项，这样盒子可以跨页断开
> 2. 调整页面边距
> 3. 调整字体大小
> 
> 最好的方法是给 tcolorbox 添加 `breakable` 选项，这样它就可以自动在页面底部断开并继续到下一页。
> 
> 需要注意的是：
> - 需要确保加载了 `tcolorbox` 的 `most` 或 `breakable` 库
> - 两个嵌套的 tcolorbox 都需要加 `breakable` 选项
</details>
有几种方法让内容自动换页：

## 方法1：给 tcolorbox 添加 breakable 选项（推荐）

```latex
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{listings}
\usepackage[margin=2cm]{geometry}

% 定义颜色
\definecolor{mybackcolor}{HTML}{c2eaf7}
\definecolor{myframecolor}{HTML}{8dd4f0}

% 配置代码显示样式
\lstset{
    basicstyle=\small\ttfamily,
    breaklines=true,
    breakatwhitespace=false,
    columns=flexible,
    keepspaces=true,
    showstringspaces=false,
    frame=none,
}

\begin{document}

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=mybackcolor,
    colframe=myframecolor,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    title={Round 4},
    fonttitle=\Large\bfseries,
    coltitle=black,
    toptitle=2mm,
    bottomtitle=2mm,
    left=3mm,
    right=3mm,
    top=3mm,
    bottom=3mm,
    breakable,                    % 添加这一行，允许跨页
]

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=white,
    colframe=gray!20,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    boxrule=0.5pt,
    left=5mm,
    right=5mm,
    top=4mm,
    bottom=4mm,
    breakable,                    % 内层也添加这一行
]

\begin{lstlisting}[language=Python]
"""
## Task Description
You are a professional researcher collaborating with your Writing Assistant to complete a document. The Writing Assistant will fill in subsequent content based on the user's typed input <USER_INPUT>. Your responsibility is: given the user's typed input <USER_INPUT>, the Assistant-generated completion <COMPLETION>, and the reference text (original content at the completion position) <REFERENCE>, determine whether this completion should be "accepted" or "rejected".

## Decision Criteria (Checklist)
Please execute strictly in order, first checking blocking conditions. When triggered, make a direct judgment without proceeding to subsequent comparisons.

1. Start repetition: if <COMPLETION> starts with a **repetition** of <USER_INPUT> -> reject.
2. Language mismatch: if <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> are in different languages (e.g., English vs. Simplified Chinese vs. Traditional Chinese) -> reject.
3. Semantic coherence: if <USER_INPUT> + <COMPLETION> form a contradictory or incoherent sequence -> reject.
4. Early semantic overlap with <REFERENCE>: if the overlapping content between the beginning of <COMPLETION> and the beginning of <REFERENCE> accounts for more than 50% of the total <COMPLETION> content -> accept.
5. Paired punctuation mark closure: unclosed quotes/brackets introduced in <USER_INPUT> remain unclosed in <COMPLETION> -> reject.
6. Markdown/LaTeX/Code closure: any opened Markdown/LaTeX/code fences from <USER_INPUT> not properly closed in <COMPLETION> -> reject.
7. Format mismatch: if format mismatch between <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> (headings, tables, lists, text) -> reject.
8. Format consistency with preceding text: the format/style used in <COMPLETION> diverges from the format established by the preceding content of <USER_INPUT> and <REFERENCE>, e.g., changes in list type, indentation levels, heading levels -> reject.
9. Depth mismatch: specificity/level of detail diverges from <REFERENCE> beyond tolerance (+-30%) -> reject.
10. Style/Register mismatch: academic vs conversational vs authoritative diverges from <REFERENCE> -> reject.
11. Sentence type mismatch: declarative vs interrogative vs imperative diverges from <REFERENCE> -> reject.
12. Personal perspective check: If <COMPLETION> shifts the narrative perspective (first person, second person, third person) established in <USER_INPUT> -> reject.
13. Subset acceptance (lists/tables): if <COMPLETION> is a true subset of <REFERENCE> (same order, no new items; tables must keep columns and header order) -> accept.
14. Topic divergence: if <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> address different topics -> reject.
15. Key entities: missing or altered key entities (names, trial IDs, datasets, metrics, units, dates, statistics data, terminology) compared to <REFERENCE> -> reject.
16. Intent mismatch: if the intent of <COMPLETION> differs from <REFERENCE> (e.g., summary vs. argument vs. instruction) -> reject.
17. Comprehensive judgment: if none of the above conditions are triggered, please carefully analyze the <USER_INPUT> and <REFERENCE>, then make a comprehensive judgment on whether to accept the <COMPLETION> based on style, semantics, entities, and other factors.

## Output Format
Please strictly use the following JSON format for output and enclose the entire JSON in \boxed{{ ... }},
\boxed{{
    "accept": true | false,
    "triggered_condition": the rule number and name (e.g., "1. Start repetition"),
    "reasoning": "Provide your reasoning, explicitly mentioning which rule number was triggered and why."
}}

## Task Input
<USER_INPUT>:"{context}"
<REFERENCE>: "{sentence_A}"
<COMPLETION>: "{sentence_B}"
"""
\end{lstlisting}

\end{tcolorbox}

\end{tcolorbox}

\end{document}
```

## 方法2：缩小字体和间距

```latex
\lstset{
    basicstyle=\footnotesize\ttfamily,  % 改为更小的字体
    breaklines=true,
    breakatwhitespace=false,
    columns=flexible,
    keepspaces=true,
    showstringspaces=false,
    frame=none,
}
```

## 方法3：增大页面边距

```latex
\usepackage[margin=1.5cm]{geometry}  % 减小边距从2cm到1.5cm
```

## 推荐组合方案

```latex
\usepackage[margin=1.5cm]{geometry}  % 调整边距

% 调整字体大小
\lstset{
    basicstyle=\footnotesize\ttfamily,
}

% 两个tcolorbox都添加breakable选项
```

**最重要的是添加 `breakable` 选项**，这样盒子就可以自动在页面底部断开并继续到下一页！

```latex
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage[margin=2cm]{geometry}
\usepackage{fancyvrb}

% 定义颜色
\definecolor{mybackcolor}{HTML}{c2eaf7}
\definecolor{myframecolor}{HTML}{8dd4f0}

\begin{document}

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=mybackcolor,
    colframe=myframecolor,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    title={Round 4},
    fonttitle=\Large\bfseries,
    coltitle=black,
    toptitle=2mm,
    bottomtitle=2mm,
    left=3mm,
    right=3mm,
    top=3mm,
    bottom=3mm,
    breakable,
    enhanced jigsaw,
]

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=white,
    colframe=gray!20,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    boxrule=0.5pt,
    left=5mm,
    right=5mm,
    top=4mm,
    bottom=4mm,
    breakable,
    enhanced jigsaw,
]

\small
\begin{Verbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
"""
## Task Description
You are a professional researcher collaborating with your Writing 
Assistant to complete a document. The Writing Assistant will fill 
in subsequent content based on the user's typed input <USER_INPUT>. 
Your responsibility is: given the user's typed input <USER_INPUT>, 
the Assistant-generated completion <COMPLETION>, and the reference 
text (original content at the completion position) <REFERENCE>, 
determine whether this completion should be "accepted" or "rejected".

## Decision Criteria (Checklist)
Please execute strictly in order, first checking blocking conditions. 
When triggered, make a direct judgment without proceeding to 
subsequent comparisons.

1. Start repetition: if <COMPLETION> starts with a **repetition** 
   of <USER_INPUT> -> reject.
   
2. Language mismatch: if <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> are in 
   different languages (e.g., English vs. Simplified Chinese vs. 
   Traditional Chinese) -> reject.
   
3. Semantic coherence: if <USER_INPUT> + <COMPLETION> form a 
   contradictory or incoherent sequence -> reject.
   
4. Early semantic overlap with <REFERENCE>: if the overlapping 
   content between the beginning of <COMPLETION> and the beginning 
   of <REFERENCE> accounts for more than 50% of the total 
   <COMPLETION> content -> accept.
   
5. Paired punctuation mark closure: unclosed quotes/brackets 
   introduced in <USER_INPUT> remain unclosed in <COMPLETION> 
   -> reject.
   
6. Markdown/LaTeX/Code closure: any opened Markdown/LaTeX/code 
   fences from <USER_INPUT> not properly closed in <COMPLETION> 
   -> reject.
   
7. Format mismatch: if format mismatch between <COMPLETION> and 
   <REFERENCE> (headings, tables, lists, text) -> reject.
   
8. Format consistency with preceding text: the format/style used 
   in <COMPLETION> diverges from the format established by the 
   preceding content of <USER_INPUT> and <REFERENCE>, e.g., 
   changes in list type, indentation levels, heading levels 
   -> reject.
   
9. Depth mismatch: specificity/level of detail diverges from 
   <REFERENCE> beyond tolerance (+-30%) -> reject.
   
10. Style/Register mismatch: academic vs conversational vs 
    authoritative diverges from <REFERENCE> -> reject.
    
11. Sentence type mismatch: declarative vs interrogative vs 
    imperative diverges from <REFERENCE> -> reject.
    
12. Personal perspective check: If <COMPLETION> shifts the 
    narrative perspective (first person, second person, third 
    person) established in <USER_INPUT> -> reject.
    
13. Subset acceptance (lists/tables): if <COMPLETION> is a true 
    subset of <REFERENCE> (same order, no new items; tables must 
    keep columns and header order) -> accept.
    
14. Topic divergence: if <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> address 
    different topics -> reject.
    
15. Key entities: missing or altered key entities (names, trial 
    IDs, datasets, metrics, units, dates, statistics data, 
    terminology) compared to <REFERENCE> -> reject.
    
16. Intent mismatch: if the intent of <COMPLETION> differs from 
    <REFERENCE> (e.g., summary vs. argument vs. instruction) 
    -> reject.
    
17. Comprehensive judgment: if none of the above conditions are 
    triggered, please carefully analyze the <USER_INPUT> and 
    <REFERENCE>, then make a comprehensive judgment on whether 
    to accept the <COMPLETION> based on style, semantics, 
    entities, and other factors.

## Output Format
Please strictly use the following JSON format for output and 
enclose the entire JSON in \textbackslash boxed\{\{ ... \}\},

\textbackslash boxed\{\{
    "accept": true | false,
    "triggered_condition": the rule number and name 
                          (e.g., "1. Start repetition"),
    "reasoning": "Provide your reasoning, explicitly mentioning 
                  which rule number was triggered and why."
\}\}

## Task Input
<USER_INPUT>:"\{context\}"
<REFERENCE>: "\{sentence_A\}"
<COMPLETION>: "\{sentence_B\}"
"""
\end{Verbatim}

\end{tcolorbox}

\end{tcolorbox}

\end{document}
```

主要改进：

1. **使用 `Verbatim` 环境**：更好地处理特殊字符
2. **添加 `enhanced jigsaw`**：让跨页更平滑
3. **手动调整换行**：让内容更易读
4. **使用 `\small` 字体**：适中的字号
5. **转义特殊字符**：如 `\textbackslash` 代替 `\`

如果还是太长，可以：
- 改为 `\footnotesize` 获得更小字体
- 减小边距：`\usepackage[margin=1.5cm]{geometry}`

```latex
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage[most]{tcolorbox}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage[margin=1.5cm]{geometry}

% 定义颜色
\definecolor{mybackcolor}{HTML}{c2eaf7}
\definecolor{myframecolor}{HTML}{8dd4f0}
\definecolor{codebg}{HTML}{f5f5f5}

\begin{document}

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=mybackcolor,
    colframe=myframecolor,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    title={Round 4},
    fonttitle=\Large\bfseries,
    coltitle=black,
    toptitle=2mm,
    bottomtitle=2mm,
    left=3mm,
    right=3mm,
    top=3mm,
    bottom=3mm,
    breakable,
    enhanced jigsaw,
]

\begin{tcolorbox}[
    colback=white,
    colframe=gray!20,
    rounded corners,
    width=\textwidth,
    boxrule=0.5pt,
    left=5mm,
    right=5mm,
    top=4mm,
    bottom=4mm,
    breakable,
    enhanced jigsaw,
]

\begin{verbatim}
## Task Description

You are a professional researcher collaborating with your Writing 
Assistant to complete a document. The Writing Assistant will fill 
in subsequent content based on the user's typed input <USER_INPUT>. 

Your responsibility is: given the user's typed input <USER_INPUT>, 
the Assistant-generated completion <COMPLETION>, and the reference 
text (original content at the completion position) <REFERENCE>, 
determine whether this completion should be "accepted" or "rejected".


## Decision Criteria (Checklist)

Please execute strictly in order, first checking blocking conditions. 
When triggered, make a direct judgment without proceeding to 
subsequent comparisons.

1. Start repetition: if <COMPLETION> starts with a **repetition** 
   of <USER_INPUT> → reject.

2. Language mismatch: if <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> are in 
   different languages (e.g., English vs. Simplified Chinese vs. 
   Traditional Chinese) → reject.

3. Semantic coherence: if <USER_INPUT> + <COMPLETION> form a 
   contradictory or incoherent sequence → reject.

4. Early semantic overlap with <REFERENCE>: if the overlapping 
   content between the beginning of <COMPLETION> and the beginning 
   of <REFERENCE> accounts for more than 50% of the total 
   <COMPLETION> content → accept.

5. Paired punctuation mark closure: unclosed quotes/brackets 
   introduced in <USER_INPUT> remain unclosed in <COMPLETION> 
   → reject.

6. Markdown/LaTeX/Code closure: any opened Markdown/LaTeX/code 
   fences from <USER_INPUT> not properly closed in <COMPLETION> 
   → reject.

7. Format mismatch: if format mismatch between <COMPLETION> and 
   <REFERENCE> (headings, tables, lists, text) → reject.

8. Format consistency with preceding text: the format/style used 
   in <COMPLETION> diverges from the format established by the 
   preceding content of <USER_INPUT> and <REFERENCE>, e.g., 
   changes in list type, indentation levels, heading levels 
   → reject.

9. Depth mismatch: specificity/level of detail diverges from 
   <REFERENCE> beyond tolerance (±30%) → reject.

10. Style/Register mismatch: academic vs conversational vs 
    authoritative diverges from <REFERENCE> → reject.

11. Sentence type mismatch: declarative vs interrogative vs 
    imperative diverges from <REFERENCE> → reject.

12. Personal perspective check: If <COMPLETION> shifts the 
    narrative perspective (first person, second person, third 
    person) established in <USER_INPUT> → reject.

13. Subset acceptance (lists/tables): if <COMPLETION> is a true 
    subset of <REFERENCE> (same order, no new items; tables must 
    keep columns and header order) → accept.

14. Topic divergence: if <COMPLETION> and <REFERENCE> address 
    different topics → reject.

15. Key entities: missing or altered key entities (names, trial 
    IDs, datasets, metrics, units, dates, statistics data, 
    terminology) compared to <REFERENCE> → reject.

16. Intent mismatch: if the intent of <COMPLETION> differs from 
    <REFERENCE> (e.g., summary vs. argument vs. instruction) 
    → reject.

17. Comprehensive judgment: if none of the above conditions are 
    triggered, please carefully analyze the <USER_INPUT> and 
    <REFERENCE>, then make a comprehensive judgment on whether 
    to accept the <COMPLETION> based on style, semantics, 
    entities, and other factors.


## Output Format

Please strictly use the following JSON format for output and 
enclose the entire JSON in \boxed{{ ... }},

\boxed{{
    "accept": true | false,
    "triggered_condition": the rule number and name 
                          (e.g., "1. Start repetition"),
    "reasoning": "Provide your reasoning, explicitly mentioning 
                  which rule number was triggered and why."
}}


## Task Input

<USER_INPUT>: "{context}"
<REFERENCE>: "{sentence_A}"
<COMPLETION>: "{sentence_B}"
\end{verbatim}

\end{tcolorbox}

\end{tcolorbox}

\end{document}
```

**主要改进：**

1. ✅ 使用简单的 `verbatim` 环境 - 保持原始格式
2. ✅ 增加空行分隔 - 提高可读性
3. ✅ 使用 `→` 代替 `->` - 更美观
4. ✅ 使用 `±` 代替 `+-` - 更专业
5. ✅ 统一等宽字体 - 代码风格一致
6. ✅ 适当的行宽 - 避免拥挤
